title: Allegro MicroSystems Unveils Industry's First Production-Ready 10 MHz TMR Current Sensor (ACS37100)
note: Fetched. DC-10 MHz, 50 ns response, 26 mA RMS noise, in production; directly falsifies C30's 'unproductized combination' premise.

title: TMR Sensor Technology, High-Accuracy Current Sensing
note: LEM claims TMR accuracy better than 1% with >10 MHz bandwidth.

title: TDK and LEM Collaborate on TMR ICs
note: TDK develops TMR dies for LEM's integrated current sensor line — second incumbent on the same roadmap.

title: AC/DC Current Sensor CT6904A (500 A, DC-4 MHz)
note: Fluxgate zero-flux, DC-4 MHz, ±0.02% rdg basic accuracy, ±5 ppm linearity — owns the accuracy flank of C30's target market.

title: CWTMini50HF AC Rogowski Coil Current Probe
note: 30-50 MHz Rogowski probe, default choice for SiC/GaN double-pulse testing — owns the speed flank.

title: 多维科技推出多系列高精度、高频响、高可靠性TMR电流传感器
note: Chinese TMR incumbent; closed-loop TMR total temperature drift 0.1-0.2% (-40 to 85 C) — benchmark for realistic accuracy floor.

title: 安徽杀出超级隐形冠军：清华老师干传感器，年入7亿全国第一 (Sinomags profile)
note: 希磁科技 Sinomags: ¥703M 2024 revenue (+18.4%), #6 global / #1 Chinese magnetic-sensor IDM, own German wafer fab, IPO filing — fills the China import-substitution angle domestically.

title: 低阻抗、高通流、主打电源应用，纳芯微推出集成式电流传感器NSM2311
note: 纳芯微 NOVOSENSE NSM2311: 100 uOhm primary, 200 A continuous, 5 kVrms isolation — Chinese integrated current-sensor IC push.

title: DT100ID Fluxgate Current Transducer
note: DT series: 2 MHz bandwidth with <1-2 ppm linearity, 50-200 A — the metrology tier C30 proposes to expand into already exists.

title: Melexis Tackles Signal Integrity Challenges in High-Power EVs with Digital Current Sensor (MLX91229)
note: MLX91229 sigma-delta digital-output sensor, 200-2000 A traction inverters — Melexis iterating in the same lane.
